Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kazan clan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Kazan clan is maneuvering aggressively for a Wei clan farm by the river.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — The Kazan clan's color in the arena is brown and red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 15''' — The Kazan Clan contains Irons.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — The Kazan clan has members serving as sentries in the camp.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Kazan clan is a group Lindon needs to visit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Kazan clan is located to the west of the valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Kazan clan has a territory with walls made of large bricks mortared by old scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Kazan clan's gates are hammered bronze lined with halfsilver or goldsteel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Kazan clan is led by a Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Kazan clan has a large territory and uses alarms of war and riders to gather.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Kazan clan participated in the Seven-Year Festival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Kazan clan uses boundary fields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Kazan clan was caught off-guard by the sky turning gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan is not from the Kazan clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — The sacred artists were members of the Kazan clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — The Kazan clan is buried.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Kazan clan reached the base of Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel and the Kazan clan reached Heaven's Glory.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The young sacred artists on the stage are from the Wei and Kazan clans.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Kazan clan is no longer among the top ten families in Sacred Valley.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
